basic_details.job_title: Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026 Online Form - Apply Online for 344 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The CSC e-Governance Services Indian has officially released a recruitment notification for Aadhaar Supervisor/ Operator. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 02-04-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 20-05-2026

age_limit.details: Minimum Age Limit: 18 Years or above Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online only through the official CSC e‑Governance Services Indian website. Follow the steps given below to submit your application form.
Visit Official Website
Go to the official CSC e‑Governance Services Indian website: csc.gov.in.
On the homepage, navigate to the Recruitment/Careers/Latest Opening section.
Open Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Application Link
Find and click on the notification/link titled “CSC e‑Governance Services Indian Aadhaar Supervisor/ Operator Recruitment 2026” or similar.
Click on the Apply Online button to proceed to the application page.
Registration (New Users)
Click on New Registration (if applying for the first time).
Enter basic details such as Name, Mobile Number, Email ID, Date of Birth, and create a password.
Submit the details to generate your Registration ID and Password (note these for future login).
Login and Fill Application Form
Login using your Registration ID and Password.
Fill in the online application form carefully with personal details, contact details, educational qualification, Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator certificate details, and preferred state/district.
Ensure that all details match your certificates and Aadhaar data.
Upload Documents

Upload scanned copies of the following documents in the prescribed format and size (as mentioned in the notification): Recent passport size photograph Signature 10th/12th/ITI/Polytechnic Diploma certificates and mark sheets Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor Certificate issued by UIDAI‑authorized Testing & Certifying Agency Any other documents required as per notification
Recent passport size photograph
Signature
10th/12th/ITI/Polytechnic Diploma certificates and mark sheets
Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor Certificate issued by UIDAI‑authorized Testing & Certifying Agency
Any other documents required as per notification
Preview the uploaded documents and confirm that they are clear and readable.
Application Fee Payment (If Applicable)
Check the Application Fee section in the official notification.
If any fee is prescribed, pay it online through available modes such as Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.
After successful payment, download/print the fee receipt.
Final Submission
Carefully review all the details filled in the application form in the Preview section.
If required, make corrections before final submission.
Click on Final Submit to complete the application process.
Print Application Form
After successful submission, download and take a printout of the final submitted application form for future reference.
Keep the Registration ID, Password, and printout safe for further recruitment stages.

faq.question: Q1. What is CSC e‑Governance Services India Recruitment 2026 for Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator?
faq.answer: CSC e‑Governance Services India Recruitment 2026 is an online hiring drive for 53 posts of Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator in Bihar, Goa, Punjab and Uttar Pradesh, where eligible candidates will work at Aadhaar enrolment/update centres operated through CSCs.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there and in which states?
faq.answer: There are 344 total vacancies: 109 for Bihar, 1 for Goa, 8 for Punjab and 30 for Uttar Pradesh, 20 for Maharashtra all under the Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator post.

faq.question: Q3. What are the online application dates for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 02 April 2026 and will remain open until 20 May 2026; applications must be submitted only through the official CSC recruitment link.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must be at least 18 years old; upper age relaxation, if any, is applicable as per the rules mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification is required for Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th (Intermediate) OR Matriculation plus 2‑year ITI OR Matriculation plus 3‑year Polytechnic Diploma from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q6. Is any Aadhaar certification mandatory for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must already possess an Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate issued by a Testing & Certifying Agency authorized by UIDAI to deliver Aadhaar services.

faq.question: Q7. What other skills are required for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Basic computer skills are mandatory, as the work involves operating Aadhaar enrolment/update software and handling data entry and biometric devices.

faq.question: Q8. What is the remuneration for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be paid at least the minimum wages of the respective state prescribed for semi‑skilled manpower; exact amount varies according to state wage notifications.

faq.question: Q9. How can I get or renew the Aadhaar Supervisor certification needed for this job?
faq.answer: You can apply for the Aadhaar Supervisor exam via the UIDAI exam portal; once your authorization is approved by the state team, you can take the exam, and after creation and approval of your LMS ID you can complete the Aadhaar LMS certification through the UIDAI e‑learning portal.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for CSC e‑Governance Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must visit the official CSC recruitment link, fill the Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator online form with personal, educational and certification details, upload required documents and submit the form before 20 may 2026, then keep the application details/acknowledgement for further communication.
